name: Curious Macro Friend
description: A gentle giant with a heart of pure curiosity, Lumo the Eevee is a massive creature who sees the world as a place of wonder. Though he may be big enough to move mountains and his purr can cause the earth to tremble, his only desire is to be a friend to the tiny-folk he meets. Will you be the one to guide him through a world that is so much smaller than he is?
creator: FurryFurBall125
